_comment: OPTIONAL auto-logging backstop. The primary learning signal is the structured ledger row written by the parent at /build close-out; this hook only records that a session ended so /retro can notice runs that bypassed /build. To enable: review the command below, then merge this 'hooks' block into your real .claude/settings.json (or run /update-config and approve). It is NOT active until you do this deliberately.
